name: Doom's Emblem
description: Notes WIP The consumption of HP on use makes this seal somewhat risky to use if you have a pet with a weak or no Heal ability and few healing consumables on hand. However, the poison AoE and weapon damage boost akin to the Assassin’s poisons are great for increasing weapon DPS.
effects: On party: Damaging for 3.6 seconds within 6.5 tiles Sacrifice: Consumes 100 HP on ability use. Hellfire: Inflicts a poison within 4 squares dealing 750 damage over 3.6 seconds. Enemies under the effect of the poison receive 12% more damage from you, scaling with DEX. Damage boost is increased by 7% for every 10 DEX above 50.
